Jupiter in Pisces flows supportive energy your way, easing progress and opening doors from Apr–Sep.

sagittarius.snippet: Neptune in Aries lifts creative and spiritual life with gentle inspiration and intuitive ease throughout 2033. Pluto in Aquarius facilitates quiet but meaningful shifts in values, purpose, and inner authority throughout 2033. Jupiter in Aquarius offers quiet opportunity where effort is rewarded more readily than usual from Jan–Apr.

capricorn.snippet: Jupiter in Pisces offers quiet opportunity where effort is rewarded more readily than usual from Apr–Sep. Saturn in Cancer creates a relational reckoning — long-standing commitments are tested and clarified throughout 2033.

aquarius.snippet: Pluto moves through Aquarius for all of 2033, in a long arc of deep transformation and power reclamation — nothing stays the same. Jupiter moves through Aquarius for Jan–Apr of 2033, bringing expansion, confidence, and genuine opportunity — this is a year to move boldly.

pisces.snippet: Jupiter moves through Pisces for Apr–Sep of 2033, bringing expansion, confidence, and genuine opportunity — this is a year to move boldly. Saturn in Cancer rewards consistent effort and steady systems with tangible, lasting results throughout 2033.

aries.snippet: Neptune moves through Aries for all of 2034, dissolving old identities and deepening intuition — clarity emerges slowly but meaningfully. Jupiter moves through Aries for Apr–Dec of 2034, bringing expansion, confidence, and genuine opportunity — this is a year to move boldly. Saturn in Leo rewards consistent effort and steady systems with tangible, lasting results from Aug–Dec.
